jp.title: Keychron×ギズマート共同開発の左右分割キーボード「Keychron Orca echo」、支援総額5億円を突破

world.title: Mining forum spotlights local content
world.description: MWANZA: STAKEHOLDERS in the country’s mining sector are meeting in Mwanza today for the Local Content Compliance Forum to assess compliance with local content regulations as authorities tighten enforcement aimed at increasing Tanzanian participation across the industry’s value chain. world.title: Rubio says Iran controlling Strait of Hormuz would set dangerous precedent
